name: Q-1 SPACE config: five SPACE dimensions (satisfaction, performance, activity, collaboration, efficiency_and_flow) declared per §10 Q-1
command: for k in satisfaction performance activity collaboration efficiency_and_flow; do grep -qE "^  $k:" "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/space/config.yaml" || { echo missing 1>&2; exit 1; }; done && echo all_dimensions 1>&2
